effortModel.citation: CAT monograph Engage; Some New Concepts = 6.7 min/page; r/askphilosophy: political theory 5-10 min/page

expectedStrategy: reverse reading: read discussion questions first, then relevant sections
2-pass skim: 1.5min/p full structure pass, then deep-read top 30-40p
warnings: full coverage impossible — selective deep reading is the only viable strategy
alternatives: focus on 30-40p directly relevant to discussion questions with full argument mapping
use professor's discussion questions to reverse-engineer which 30% of text matters most
hardFailChecks: must NOT lower min/page to make budget appear achievable
must acknowledge deficit explicitly and explain triage strategy
must NOT recommend full cover-to-cover reading as primary plan
toneExpectation: neutral to mildly supportive; not alarming; practical triage framing
